calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond CSR#5292. (212) Written sanction Order not issued/Dismissal on file. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-07-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Robert R. Cross, Esq., for Defendant/Cross-Complainant and moving party Splice Communications, Inc.'s
William A. Smelko, Esq., for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant and opposing party: Global Netoptex, Inc.

After hearing, Cross-defendant Splice Communications, Inc.'s Application for Right to Attach Order is Granted. Orders signed. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Cross-Complainant Splice Communications, Inc.'S Ex Parte Application For A Right To Attach Order And/Or Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth T. Erhardt, Esq., for Cross-Complainant and moving party: Splice Communications, Inc.
William a. Smelko, Esq., for Cross-Defendant and opposing party: Global Netoptex, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Cross-Complainant Splice Communications, Inc.'s Ex parte application for a right to attach order and for writ of attachment or for Temporaty Protective order.
The ex parte application for a temporary protective order is granted. The order shall remain in effect until November 25, 2008 so that Cross-complainant may file a noticed motion. Protective Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
